title: AgentFrontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of agent files under agents/. Enforces Constitution v2.0.1 Principle V.

name.description: Kebab-case agent identifier. MUST equal the filename without extension.

description.description: One-line summary of what the agent does and what it is NOT for. English only.

tools.description: Comma-separated allowlist of tool names. Implicit inheritance is forbidden by Principle V.

model.description: Optional model pin. Omitted in this repository's agents by convention.

examples.name: ui-ux-pro-max-designer
examples.description: UI/UX designer agent. Invoke for design direction, tokens, mockups, component specs, banners, slides, logos, CIP. Does NOT write .tsx React code — defers to frontend-react-developer.
examples.tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, Write, Edit, Task, Skill, WebFetch
